fields.description: A valid web, email, phone, or relative link.

fields.description: UUID from Madison Studio — set automatically on sync

fields.description: Set by Madison Studio when content is ready for editorial review

fields.description: The websiteSku from Convex — links this Sanity record to a specific product variant. Used to look up editorial content on the product page.

fields.description: Editorial description shown below the Add to Cart button on the product detail page. Overrides the catalog description when present.

fields.description: Add 1 slide for a static hero, or 2+ for a rotating carousel (e.g. Black Friday, seasonal promos). Each slide has its own image, text, and button link.

of.description: The large banner at the top of the homepage. Choose image or video, then add text overlays.

fields.description: Small uppercase label above the section title. Example: Guided Browsing

fields.description: Main heading for the section. Example: Start Here

fields.initialValue: Choose your use case to narrow the catalog faster.
fields.description: Supporting sentence below the title. Explains what the cards do.
fields.name: startHereSubheading
fields.title: Start Here — Subheading

fields.description: Up to 6 cards. Each links to a filtered catalog view. Drag to reorder.

of.description: One card in the Guided Browsing section. Links to a filtered catalog view.

fields.description: Bottle families shown in the carousel. Family Slug must match catalog exactly (e.g. Boston Round, Cylinder). Use Order to sort.

fields.description: Featured blog articles and section heading. Links to Journal posts.

fields.description: Optional featured images for mega menu. Link structure stays in code.

description: Editorial content that applies to ALL products in a design family. Individual product overrides take priority over this.

fields.name: family
fields.title: Design Family

list.title: Premium — Gallery · Description · Feature Strip · FAQ
Collection — Promo Banner · Features · Gallery · Description

fields.description: Sets the default block order for all products in this family. Individual product overrides can change the order.
fields.name: templateType
fields.title: Default Template

fields.description: Lifestyle or editorial image representing the whole family. Shown as the banner on the catalog page when this family is filtered. Recommended: 1400×600px wide.
fields.name: familyHeroImage

fields.description: 2–3 sentence brand narrative about this bottle family. Shown below the family name on catalog and product pages.
fields.name: familyStory

fields.description: Drag blocks into the order you want them to appear on every product page in this family. Individual products can add their own blocks or override the order.

of.description: A horizontal row of icon + label cards. Great for callouts like 'UV Protected', 'Type III Glass', 'Ships in 3 Days'.

of.description: Full editorial copy for this product. Supports bold, italics, links, and callout quotes. Overrides the plain-text description from the catalog.
of.title: Rich Description

of.description: A scrollable row of additional product images — lifestyle shots, in-use photos, detail close-ups. These appear alongside or below the main product image.
of.title: Gallery Row

of.description: A high-visibility promotional strip. Add a headline, supporting copy, optional countdown timer, and a CTA button. Great for limited-time deals, new arrivals, or featured collections.

of.description: Collapsible Q&A section. Use for product-specific questions about compatibility, care, materials, or ordering.
of.title: FAQ Accordion

of.description: Small pill badges that appear as a row below the product name or Add to Cart. Use presets or add custom text.
of.title: Trust Badges

fields.description: OFF = this product's blocks are prepended to the family template blocks. ON = only this product's blocks are shown (family template is ignored entirely).
